title: trasus oederi
intro: Trasus oederi, also known as Sweet Annie, is an annual herb belonging to the Artemisia genus, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Trasus oederi lie in its essential oils, which have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sweet Annie include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Trasus oederi can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
